# Chapter 30 Reports

This chapter introduces the supervisor report functions:

· Selecting a report

· Learning about the report interface

· Using report filters

· Exporting a report

· Printing a report


## 30.1 Selecting Reports

To select a report:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > View > Reports. The Reports window and Reports category
list appear.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/317.2.png)




2\. Double-click a report category to expand it.

3\. Double-click a report to display the available filters.
The available filters vary by report.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/317.3.png)




<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="317" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 30 Reports" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/318.1.png)




## 30.2 Report Options

The reports interface provides numerous report options. The following information summarizes
these options. Refer to the Machine Accounting Report Glossary for the applicable Machine
Accounting application for a list of the standard reports.


### 30.2.1 Report Interface

Report and filter options vary by the report category.




![Figure 30-1 Report Interface](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/318.2.png)




The following table describes the report filter options:


<table>
<tr>
<th>#</th>
<th>Item</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Report categories and reports</td>
<td>Provides a listing of report category options. Once a category is selected, individual report options appear for selection.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Report toolbar</td>
<td>Provides a menu of options for generating reports.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>Open windows</td>
<td>More than one report can be filtered. Multiple reports may be open at one time.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4 and 7</td>
<td>Report filters</td>
<td>Once a report has been selected, select report options from this list or from the tabs on the right. For example, selecting Denomination in the list brings the tab to the front.</td>
</tr>
</table>


<!-- PageNumber="318" -->
<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 30 Reports" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/319.1.png)




<table>
<tr>
<th>#</th>
<th>Item</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>Filter Options</td>
<td>To select machines included in the output: . Display All Machines-Include all machines. . Use Filter-Use filters to display only the selected machines. . Use Machine List-Create a machine list to display by entering machine numbers into a Machine List field. Separate multiple machine numbers with commas. ☐ Display All Machines ☐ Use Filter ☒ Use Machine List Preview Selected Machines Select Filters Machine List Machine List:(separate by commas, no spaces) 3101, 3103</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>6</td>
<td>Selected machine options</td>
<td>Preview Selected Machines-Select to display the machines populating the report. Select Filters-Select Use Filter, then Select Filters to display filter tabs. Alternatively, select filters from the filter list on the left. · Machine List-Enter machine numbers into a Machine List field ro create a machine list.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>8</td>
<td>View Report</td>
<td>Click to view the report.</td>
</tr>
</table>


<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="319" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 30 Reports" -->


### 30.2.2 Using Report Filters

To use filters to select machines for a report:

1\. Navigate to IGT Spade > View > Reports. The Reports window and Reports category
list appear.

2\. Select Use Filter.

3\. Click the Select Filters tab or click a filter in the machine filter list. The Select Filters tab
opens.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/320.1.png)




4\. Select the applicable filters for each report.
OR

Choose Select All.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/320.2.png)






![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/320.3.png)




A yellow funnel icon appears next to each filter with an active selection.

5\. Click Preview Selected Machines. The list of selected machines appears.

<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="320" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 30 Reports" -->




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/321.1.png)

#### 6. Click Date Range. A date-selection window appears.


##### 7. Select the Start Date and End Date for the report.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/321.2.png)




###### 8. Select other date filters as needed.

Each report offers a unique assortment of date-filter options.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/321.3.png)




9\. Click Report Type. The Report Type window appears.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/321.4.png)




<!-- PageFooter="Machine Accounting 9.7.5" -->
<!-- PageNumber="321" -->
<!-- PageBreak -->

<!-- PageHeader="Chapter 30 Reports" -->

10\. Select a report type from the Report Type drop-down list.

11\. Click View Report. The report displays.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/322.1.png)




Multiple reports may be opened at the same time.

. Click the Hide or Show Report Filters icon at the top-left corner of the Reports
window to reopen the Filter Selection window.

appears. Click the value to open a detailed report for additional information.

. Some reports include bookmarks for faster drill-down access. Use the Show/Hide

12\. Click the Close Report icon in the top-right corner. All reports currently open under the
Reports tab close.


## 30.2.3 Exporting Reports

To export a report:

1\. Generate the applicable report.

2\. Click Export. The Export report options window appears.

3\. Select the desired file format.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/323.2.png)




4\. Click OK. The report opens in the selected format with the associated program.


### 30.2.4 Printing Report

To print a report:

1\. Generate the applicable report.

2\. Click the Print icon on the report toolbar. The report prints with the default paper size
selected on the default printer.




![](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/323.3.png)




Export the report to print on paper other than the default size.
